Shipping and Delivery Policy

Standard shipping is available for physical goods and takes 5–10 business days within the continental United States. Expedited shipping (2–3 business days) is available at an additional fee calculated at checkout. Overnight shipping is available for orders placed before 2:00 PM Eastern Time on business days.

International shipping is available to 42 countries. Delivery times for international orders range from 10–21 business days depending on destination and customs processing. Axiom LLC is not responsible for customs duties, import taxes, or delays caused by customs agencies.

Orders over $150 qualify for free standard shipping within the continental United States. Free shipping does not apply to expedited or overnight options.

Orders are processed within 1–2 business days of placement. Tracking information is sent via email once the order has shipped. Axiom is not liable for delays caused by shipping carriers after the order has been dispatched.
